summary: Accomplished Senior QA Engineer with 4 years of experience in delivering high-quality software solutions through rigorous testing and process optimization. Expert in leading QA initiatives, developing and executing robust test plans, and implementing cutting-edge automated testing frameworks.

experience.title: Senior QA Engineer
responsibilities: Developed and maintained automation test scripts for Inventory Delivery Broker (IDB) using Robot Framework in PyCharm, ensuring efficient test execution and reliability.
Conducted API testing using Postman, validating RESTful APIs with various request methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), handling both positive and negative test cases.
Created and executed test cases with multiple request combinations, ensuring comprehensive test coverage and identifying critical defects.

experience.title: Senior QA Engineer
responsibilities: Involved in end to end testing of BSS Telecom domain with hands on experience in various Tecnotree products - Customer management (DCLM), Order and product catalog management.
Built automated test scripts to handle repetitive software testing work.
Enhanced team efficiency by implementing agile methodologies and streamlining QA processes.
Hands-on experience in API testing (SOAP & REST), Data Migration testing, Regression testing and UI/UX testing.

projects.name: VENTAS (etisalat)
projects.description: Performed comprehensive API testing using Postman, validating request/response payloads, status codes, and error handling across multiple endpoints. Maintained detailed documentation of test cases, execution reports, and defect logs for future reference and audit purposes.

projects.name: Ooredoo Tunisia
projects.description: Designed and executed 1,500+ test cases for CRM, achieving 98% coverage with under 0.1% escape defects. Enhanced defect identification by 30% by implementing a systematic approach using JIRA.

projects.name: ZAIN Bahrain
projects.description: Executed 200+ automated and manual test scenarios bi-weekly, maintaining a steady release cadence with less than 2% rollback incidents. Spearheaded the adoption of SQL clients for database testing, resulting in a 40% improvement in data validation accuracy.

projects.name: STC Kuwait
projects.description: Designed test plans and scripts for 3 new software product lines, boosting test coverage and efficiency by 15%. Identified and documented over 300 bugs in the first year, consistently meeting milestone deadlines.
